name: For Loop
description: Generates a sequence of numbers and executes the loop body for each.
python_code:
import asyncio
async def execute(self, inputs):
    start = int(inputs.get('start', 0))
    end = int(inputs.get('end', 10))
    step = int(inputs.get('step', 1))
    
    self.log_info(f"Looping from {start} to {end}")
    
    for i in range(start, end, step):
        if self.is_stopped():
            break
            
        self.set_output('current_index', i)
        self.log_info(f"Loop iteration: {i}")
        
        # Trigger loop body branch
        self.set_output('loop_body', True)
        
        # Optional: yield to event loop if we want real-time UI updates between iterations
        await asyncio.sleep(0.01)
        
    # Trigger sequential output when loop is fully done
    self.set_output('then', True)
    return {}
